name: To-Do List Management
goal: Cross-functional team managing the To-Do app end-to-end. Engineering work is tracked on the TBT Jira board. The Scrum Master coordinates, delegating to Engineer (build/fix) or QA (verify) as appropriate.

feeds.jql: project = TBT AND status = "To Do" AND assignee = "triage.bot@flipp.com"
